title: phacelia heterophylla var. compacta
intro: Phacelia heterophylla var. compacta, also known as compact blue phacelia or compact blue scorpion weed, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Phacelia heterophylla var. compacta include its ability to aid in digestion and relieve symptoms of stomach ulcers, as well as its potential to act as an antiviral agent against certain viral infections. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
